race.comment: EFFORTLESSLY (4) got the job done over this trip two back when flying late, before going under as favourite last start on the Scarpside at Pinjarra. Martinan hops on board now with her claim coming in handy and she draws ideally with her racing pattern. Can get back to winning ways. MR KARADEC (2) comes back from an Open 3YO racing first-up where he wasn't disgraced. His breeding suggests getting out in trip is a big tick and he broke his maiden in good style when over 1400m second-up last campaign. Worth plenty of thought. FRIAR'S LEGACY (1) is knocking on the door of another win and can't be left out of calculations. MANTA RAY BAY (8) is worth including at big odds.
